text:

From-To: antoine->mat

Hi, 

Here are the results of the exp-run:  2 ports failed to package (although they built fine): 

+ {"origin"=>"databases/pg_reorg", "pkgname"=>"pg_reorg-1.1.8", "phase"=>"package", "errortype"=>"PLIST"} 
+ {"origin"=>"databases/pgrouting", "pkgname"=>"pgrouting-2.0.0_1", "phase"=>"package", "errortype"=>"PLIST"} 

Logs are available at: 

http://package22.nyi.freebsd.org/bulk/91amd64-default-pr190321/2014-05-28_00h16m52s/logs/errors/pg_reorg-1.1.8.log
